title: malus sylvestris var. aldenhamensis
intro: Malus sylvestris var. aldenhamensis, also known as Aldenham crab apple, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the wild apple (Malus sylvestris) native to the UK. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which has been used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aldenham crab apple include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
